properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the valley of the shadow, when death breaks our heart, We feel the weight of sorrow as our world falls apart, But though we weep, we still believe in the promise of Christ, Our faith in Him is the confidence of everlasting life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So we grieve, but not as others who have no hope, And we cry, but deep inside of us we know, The grave is not the end, reunion lies ahead, In the arms of Jesus there is comfort, Yes, we grieve, but not as others.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the tears are never ending and nights are so long, We hold on to the memories and we pray to carry on, But in the pain we find a grace only God could give, Death has no sin or victory because our Savior lives.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We grieve, but not as others who have no hope, And we cry, but deep inside of us we know, The grave is not the end, reunion lies ahead, In the arms of Jesus there is comfort.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Yes, we grieve, but not as others, The grave is not the end, reunion lies ahead, In the arms of Jesus there is comfort, Yes, we grieve, but not as others, Yes, we grieve But not as others.
